texto: I really love New York, and I've lived here for a long time. I know not just the different neighborhoods but the different kind of class cultures in New York from the up-and-coming, down-and-out kind of artist to the powerful worlds of finance.
explicacao: Citação de Neil Burger sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “I really love New York, and I've lived here for a long time. I know not just the different neighb…” articula amor, love, time em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como time e artist.
